name: xharvester
summary: ⚡ **xharvester v1.0** is a cross-platform enhanced Python-based reconnaissance and exploitation suite designed for security assessments of radio frequency (RF), wireless (Bluetooth & WiFi), industrial control systems (SCADA), and automotive systems with **automatic GitHub updates** and **full Android/Termux & IOS/a-Shell support**!

documentation.readme: ⚡ **xharvester v1.0** is a cross-platform enhanced Python-based reconnaissance and exploitation suite designed for security assessments of radio frequency (RF), wireless (Bluetooth & WiFi), industrial control systems (SCADA), and automotive systems with **automatic GitHub updates** and **full Android/Termux & IOS/a-Shell support**!

function_signatures.name: index_entry_in_the_reconnaissance_category_use_as_a_candidate_tool_in_the_chain_planner_after_a_nvd_lookup_pass_on_the_target_vendor
function_signatures.description: Index entry in the Reconnaissance category. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner after a NVD/lookup pass on the target vendor.

function_signatures.name: pairs_with_the_reconnaissance_system_prompt_stanza_in_core_ai_backend_chain_to_teach_the_llm_the_standard_invocation_pattern
function_signatures.description: Pairs with the Reconnaissance system-prompt stanza in core.ai_backend.chain to teach the LLM the standard invocation pattern.

function_signatures.name: operator_initiated_the_chain_step_is_gated_by_the_per_step_accept_cancel_gate_the_tool_does_not_auto_execute
function_signatures.description: Operator-initiated: the chain step is gated by the per-step ACCEPT/CANCEL gate; the tool does not auto-execute.

function_signatures.name: use_as_a_reference_implementation_when_designing_a_new_v3_method_for_this_category
function_signatures.description: Use as a reference implementation when designing a new v3 method for this category.

function_signatures.name: use_as_a_teaching_example_in_the_prompt_stanza_so_the_llm_can_reason_about_the_right_run_order
function_signatures.description: Use as a teaching example in the prompt stanza so the LLM can reason about the right run order.

function_signatures.name: main
function_signatures.description: Top-level entry point for xharvester (n3twork5/xharvester). Reads CLI args, dispatches to subcommands.

function_signatures.name: run
function_signatures.description: Top-level CLI runner for xharvester. Returns a result envelope (ok, data, error).

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with HarshitManhas/vulnerability-scanner-shodan (score=12); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with demonCoder95/wifi-recon (score=11); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with ahirankush771/netprobe (score=11); pair in the chain planner.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: Index entry in the Reconnaissance category. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner after a NVD/lookup pass on the target vendor.
Pairs with the Reconnaissance system-prompt stanza in core.ai_backend.chain to teach the LLM the standard invocation pattern.
Operator-initiated: the chain step is gated by the per-step ACCEPT/CANCEL gate; the tool does not auto-execute.
Use as a reference implementation when designing a new v3 method for this category.
Use as a teaching example in the prompt stanza so the LLM can reason about the right run order.
